note: Pilot corpus for the claim-grounding eval (docs/plans/claim-grounding-eval.md). Three papers: the documented worst case, a table-dense paper, and a short clean-prose control. PDFs are not checked in; they are sourced from the sibling velocity.report set and pinned by sha256, so a pinned PDF yields pinned markdown yields stable eval input. arxivId records the intended canonical source; sha256 pins the exact bytes actually used.

papers.title: Learning Lane Graph Representations for Motion Forecasting (LaneGCN)
nuScenes: A Multimodal Dataset for Autonomous Driving
